raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas Kehnisch no See-
metka-Puffes greesifees aptahrt/
un fakrahs leelakn Pulkı/ ne ka
tas pirmajs bija / un pehz zit-
teem Gaddeem atnahks wiꞥſch
ar leelu Spehku un ar leelu Pa-
dohmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir tannî Laikâ daudszel-
fees prett to Kehnizu no Deenas-
Widus/ un zitti Atkahpajt no
taweem Zaudim greenopees / ka
to Praweechnu Mahziba peepil-
dita tobı/ bet tee krittihg.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnisch no See-
metka-Puffes nahks/ un usnet-
tihs Wallus/ un usnems stip-
rus Pilstahtus/ un tee Elconi
prett Deenas-Widdu ne pastah-
wehs/ nedg wiꞥſch islaftiti Zan-
dis/ ir tur ne buhs ne kahds
Spehks vastahweht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas/ kas prett wiꞥſch
nahks/ darrihs / kas wiꞥſch
patihk/ jo neweens wiꞥſch Breek-
tchâ pastahwehs. Wiꞥſch stah-
wehs arrı mihliga Semmê/ un
famaitahs to ar fawu Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch taifihg fawı
Watgu ar wiꞥſch fawas Walsti-
bas Spehku nahkt/ un tee Tats-
ee buhs ar wiꞥſchı / un wiꞥſch
darrihs to / ka wiꞥſch tam fawı
Meitu par Seevu dohd/ gribbe-
dans wiꞥſchı famaitaht/ bet ta
wiꞥſchım klaht ne stahwehs/ nedg
pee wiꞥſchı turrefees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to greesifees wiꞥſch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tä greesifees wiꞥſch at-
pakat ustawaß Semmes Stip-
rumeein/ un peedausifees / un
krittihs / ka wiꞥſch nekur taps
atrasts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winna Weetâ zelſees
weens/ kas Plehfaius isfuhtihs
(par) Gohdibu tahs Walstibus/
vet wiꞥſch eekſch kahdahm Dee-
nahm taps falauſhts/ ne zaür
Dusnibu / nei zaür Karzu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winna Weetâ zelſees
weens Nelectis / kam ta Kehni-
na Gohdiba ne taptu dohta/ tat-
schu wiꞥſch klaftikam nahks/ un
usnens to Walstibu ar mihk-
steem Wahrdeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Elconi/ kas ( zit-
tus) pahrpluhde / taps winna
Breefscha pahrpluhsti/ un taps
falauſhti/ ir tahs Derribas Leels-
Kungs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo wiꞥſch ar to * wiltigi
apbeedrinateeß/ un zelſees/ un
pahrwarrehs to ar mas Zandim.
* Eebr: Wall. No tahs Apbeedrinaſchanas
ar winna, darrihs wiꞥſch Wilru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch arrı klaftikam
eekſch tahm baggatahm ( Wal-
stibus) Weetahm nahks/ un dar-
rihs/ fo nedg winna Tehwineds
Tehwn Tehwi padarrifschi / ar
Laupijumu un Pohstifchann/ fo
wiꞥſch starp teem tsdallihs/ un
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
